headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Scores Near-Perfect Valuation Rating in Decent Value Screen
summary: Newmont Corp (NEM) screens as a classic value stock with high profitability and health. Its P/E of 11.65 offers a strong margin of safety, avoiding value traps.
